site: Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen
title: About | The Law Offices of Adam V. Nguyen Serves California
content:
We want you, the client, to know that you are our number one priority. The outcome of your case may impact you for years to come, and this is true regardless of whether you are facing a family law matter, a business matter, or otherwise. Our legal team has helped countless individuals through various complex legal issues over the years, and we are here to do the same for you. Contact us today to learn more about our attorneys, our firm, and how we can assist you.

#### Jacqueline Shimabukuro
